creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
(In reply to Peter Wemm from comment #0)

 > Obviously these don't work:
 > convert_sqlite: line 41: ../../src/db/schema.sqlite: No such file or directory

The migration scripts are a moving target and thus painful to deal
with. A workaround would be to run this directly from the
source directory, so do a make extract and run it from:

      .../work/opendnssec-2.0.3/enforcer/util/1.4-2.0_db_convert

The next patch should make it possible mitigate this somewhat
and allows for more flexibility.
